title: Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal Song Lyrics Niram Maratha Pookal
stanzas:
Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal Song Lyrics Niram Maratha Pookal
#ilaiyaraja #SPB #SJanaki

kan paarammaa
aathaaram nee illaamal
vaeraethammaa
seethaa en kadhal kodiye
kan paarammaa
aathaaram nee illaamal
vaeraethammaa

aasaiyudan nambi vandha
pennai indru mosam
seitha dhrogiye

un kobam thevai thaanaa
anbae aaruyire.
adhu yaar andha pen
oru nadigaiammaa
andha kaludhaiyai
nee konji anaipadhu thavaru

Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal
duet paada vandhayo.
nee kadhal manmadhano
naan parandhu poveno.

jeenathin kanavil vandhaal
un polave.
singaara paavai undhan
vadivaagave.(2)

jeenathaman pola
ennai ennai vandhu
paattu paaddum
dhrogiye.. ayyayoo
chumma thaan jaadayil
sonne en kannae
kanmaniye

enai pol oru pen
indha ulagil illai
oru nadigaiyai pol
enai paarpadhu thavaru.

Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal
duet paada vandheney.
en kadhal payingkiliye
nee parandhu pogaadhe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Niram Maratha Pookal.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1979.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal, the duet unfolds a tender narrative of love, where the singers express their heartfelt emotions. The song's soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, resonates with listeners, evoking nostalgia and warmth. It beautifully captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a perfect fit for celebrations like anniversaries and weddings. The heartfelt lyrics and enchanting voices create a timeless experience that continues to touch hearts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal is a timeless romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, this song showcases the magical composition of Ilaiyaraaja. Dive into the nostalgic melodies of Niram Maratha Pookal and let the emotions sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: I have come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal.
Oh my love, don't fly away like a bird.
I have come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal.
Without you, my support is nothing, my love. Without you, I have no other way.
With desire, I trusted a woman who has now betrayed me.
Is your anger necessary, my dear? Who is that girl, an actress, that you are holding onto?
Did you come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal? Are you the love god? Should I fly away?
I have come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal.
If everyone is like a sculpture, I will forget you in my heart.
If you come into my dreams, you are just like her. Beautiful girl, you are my desire.
Like me, there is no other woman in this world; don't mistake me for an actress.
I have come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal. Oh my love, don't fly away like a bird.
Did you come to sing the duet of Mudhan Mudhalaga Kadhal?
